proposal.title: Adaptive Benchmark Cycle Framework
proposal.description: Current benchmarks are static (weekly/monthly). Implement adaptive benchmarking: (1) trigger benchmarks based on gradient magnitude spikes (when any gradient category exceeds threshold, auto-trigger benchmark), (2) benchmark result correlation engine (compare benchmark scores against proposal success rates to validate benchmark accuracy), (3) dynamic benchmark frequency (high-activity periods → daily benchmarks, low-activity → weekly), (4) cross-benchmark aggregation (aggregate DevGroup, VisualMedia, and individual agent benchmarks into unified score). Target: reduce benchmark lag from 7 days to adaptive <24 hours.

notes: Generated via TPG-GRAO-AutoEvolution cron saturation trigger. Targets benchmarking lag — current static cycles miss rapid gradient changes.
